zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Cookney於1615年4月18日出生在英國諾廷加姆爾時，她的父親John Cookney21歲，母親Joan Smithe18歲。她於大約1635年與Godfrey Ragsdale I在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州亨利可結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1644年4月18日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州易斯爾 本 懷特帕斯 菲爾德享年29歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Cookney于1615年4月18日出生在英国諾廷加姆爾时，她的父亲John Cookney21岁，母亲Joan Smithe18岁。她于大约1635年与Godfrey Ragsdale I在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州亨利可结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1644年4月18日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州易斯爾 本 懷特帕斯 菲爾德享年29岁。

nameMeanings.name: Cookney
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (West Midlands): habitational name from a place in Worcestershire named Cooksey, from the genitive case of the Old English personal name Cucu (perhaps a byname from Old English cwicu ‘lively’) + Old English ēg ‘island’.

variants.name: Coxey
meanings: English (Lancashire and Cheshire): variant of   Cooksey  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Cookney was born on 18 April 1615, in Nottinghamshire, England, her father, John Cookney, was 21 and her mother, Joan Smithe, was 18. She married Godfrey Ragsdale I about 1635, in Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died on 18 April 1644, in Pates Field, Isle of Wight, Virginia, British Colonial America, at the age of 29.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Cookney est née le 18 avril 1615, à Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, John Cookney, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Joan Smithe, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé Godfrey Ragsdale I environ 1635, à Henrico, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée le 18 avril 1644, à Pates Field, Isle of Wight, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 29 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Cookneyが1615年4月18日にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアで生まれた時，父John Cookneyは21歳，母Joan Smitheは18歳であった。約1635年にイギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州ヘンリコでGodfrey Ragsdale Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1644年4月18日にイギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州イスル オフ ウィトプアツ フィールドで29歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Cookney(이)가 1615년 4월 18일 영국 노틴그함실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Cookney(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Smithe(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 대략 1635년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 헨리코에서 Godfrey Ragsdale I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1644년 4월 18일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 이슬일 프 와이트 패츠 필드에서 29세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Cookney nasceu em 18 de abril de 1615, em Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Cookney, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Joan Smithe, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com Godfrey Ragsdale I aproximadamente 1635, em Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 18 de abril de 1644, em Pates Field, Isle of Wight, Virginia, British Colonial America, com 29 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Cookney родилась 18 апреля 1615 г. в местности ноттингхамшир, Англия, её отцу по имени John Cookney было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Joan Smithe, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Godfrey Ragsdale I около 1635 г. в местности хенрику, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла 18 апреля 1644 г. в местности пэитс фиелд, исл оф ваит, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 29 лет.
